holdings.infoBox: VSDA is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are Franklin Resources stock at 3.98%, T. Rowe Price Group at 3.84%, Kimberly-Clark at 3.54%, Hormel Foods at 3.48%, and Altria Group at 3.47%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares Dividend Accelerator ETF (VSDA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Victory Dividend Accelerator index. The fund tracks an index of dividend-paying US large- and mid-cap stocks with a high likelihood of future dividend growth. VSDA was launched on Apr 18, 2017 and is issued by VictoryShares.
